title: Zoro Cuts Through the War
description: The giant serpent Nola turns the battlefield into a trap, scattering fighters and forcing Luffy and others into a stranger survival fight.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene centers on Luffy, Wyper, Zoro, Nami, Chopper. The giant serpent Nola turns the battlefield into a trap, scattering fighters and forcing Luffy and others into a stranger survival fight.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: saved both the ship and the crew!!

summary: The giant serpent Nola turns the battlefield into a trap, scattering fighters and forcing Luffy and others into a stranger survival fight.
